name: Sphinx of Wonder

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The sphinx has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

text:
# Sphinx of Wonder

*Tiny Celestial, Lawful Good*

### Actions

**Rend.** Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Radiant damage.
